message:
fix: remove dead style constants, add CASS_RESPECT_NO_COLOR and terminal cap detection

Remove unused STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE, STYLE_TAB_INACTIVE, STYLE_KBD_KEY, STYLE_KBD_DESC
constants from style_system.rs (flagged by UBS scan).
Include terminal capability detection for interactive TUI sessions and
CASS_RESPECT_NO_COLOR env var support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
